task: Parse an industry standard compliance matrix, extract standard id, owner, requirements, severity, exception rules, quality logs, and retrieval chunks.
plan: Inspect input type, document metadata, and natural-language task objective
Infer task intents and generate a target extraction schema
Choose MinerU/native parsing path and record execution rationale
Normalize content blocks with page-level or document-level provenance
Build markdown, section, key-value, table, numeric, and field-evidence views
Run task-specific post-processing and quality checks
Select recovery action from issue codes, retry history, and task priorities
Produce traceable result, summary, retrieval chunks, and audit logs
Prioritize section hierarchy, clause-like paragraphs, parties, obligations, and dates
Preserve source page or document heading evidence for each clause
Apply task intent `structured_extraction` with schema-aware extraction and verification

planning_rationale.profile_reason: standard/contract keywords or explicit profile require section and clause preservation
planning_rationale.runner_reason: HTML/DOCX/PPTX inputs are handled by native extractors to preserve document structure without MinerU
planning_rationale.backend_reason: backend=pipeline is used for MinerU parsing when the selected runner calls MinerU
planning_rationale.method_reason: method=auto balances automatic parsing with OCR fallback when quality gates require it
planning_rationale.lang_reason: lang=ch is passed to MinerU or recorded for native extraction audit
recovery_policy: text_cleanup if mojibake or encoding noise is detected
ocr_retry for PDF/image results with blocking extraction or OCR-related quality issues
cli_fallback when online API lacks page-level provenance and a local MinerU CLI is available
manual_numeric_review when subtotal/total consistency checks fail

rationale: schema and recovery priorities are derived before parsing and saved for audit

agent_action_plan.objective: Parse an industry standard compliance matrix, extract standard id, owner, requirements, severity, exception rules, quality logs, and retrieval chunks.

subtasks.goal: Classify the document task and identify intent-specific outputs.
Pick the cheapest parser path that still preserves required provenance.
Normalize sections, tables, key-values, numeric facts, and field evidence.
Run profile and task-specific gates before accepting the result.
Map quality issues to recovery actions and select the best attempt.
Write result, trace, summary, and retrieval artifacts.

tool_registry.name: native_extractor
tool_registry.capability: Parse HTML/DOCX/PPTX structure without external OCR

tool_registry.name: mineru_cli
tool_registry.capability: Run local MinerU CLI and keep page/layout artifacts

tool_registry.name: mineru_agent_api
tool_registry.capability: Run online MinerU Agent API for CPU-friendly PDF parsing

tool_registry.name: llm_preplanner
tool_registry.capability: Classify task and propose schema/controls before parsing

tool_registry.name: structured_extractor
tool_registry.capability: Build sections, tables, key-values, numeric facts, and field evidence

tool_registry.name: numeric_validator
tool_registry.capability: Check numeric facts and table totals

tool_registry.name: workflow_validator
tool_registry.capability: Check workflow steps, anomalies, and visual-review hints

tool_registry.name: text_cleanup
tool_registry.capability: Clean mojibake/encoding noise and re-evaluate quality

tool_registry.name: ocr_retry
tool_registry.capability: Retry parse with OCR mode after sparse/weak PDF result

tool_registry.name: cli_fallback
tool_registry.capability: Fallback from online API to CLI when page provenance is missing

tool_registry.name: llm_post_review
tool_registry.capability: Review extracted result for risks and recovery suggestions

tool_registry.name: retrieval_exporter
tool_registry.selection_reason: always needed for downstream data use

dynamic_choices.name: profile
dynamic_choices.reason: task and file signals after optional LLM merge

dynamic_choices.name: runner
dynamic_choices.reason: native suffix, CLI/API configuration, and provenance requirement

dynamic_choices.name: backend
dynamic_choices.reason: MinerU backend used when runner calls MinerU

dynamic_choices.name: method
dynamic_choices.reason: initial parse method; recovery can switch to OCR

dynamic_choices.name: llm
dynamic_choices.reason: enabled only when a provider client is configured

dynamic_choices.name: provenance_requirement
dynamic_choices.reason: PDF/image outputs benefit most from page-level audit

replan_triggers.reason: encoding noise can be improved without rerunning OCR
sparse PDF text often needs OCR mode
audit tasks need page-level source evidence
numeric mismatch should not be silently repaired

nodes.goal: Classify the document task and identify intent-specific outputs.
Pick the cheapest parser path that still preserves required provenance.
Normalize sections, tables, key-values, numeric facts, and field evidence.
Run profile and task-specific gates before accepting the result.
Map quality issues to recovery actions and select the best attempt.
Write result, trace, summary, and retrieval artifacts.

loop_policy.selection_rule: choose highest quality score while preserving audit trail
loop_policy.fallback_when_all_recovery_fails: return best available partial result with recovery_decision attempts

memory_policy.reason: Competition submission keeps runs deterministic; cross-run learning can be added by indexing prior traces.

loop_policy.selection_rule: choose highest quality score while preserving audit trail
loop_policy.fallback_when_all_recovery_fails: return best available partial result with recovery_decision attempts

runtime_recovery_plan.boundary: Runtime recovery consumes agent_action_plan replan triggers, validator fallback policies, and bounded LLM recovery suggestions; it is deterministic, not a general multi-turn planner.

replan_after_quality.selected_reason: initial result remained the best accepted quality attempt

sections.title: Industry Standard Compliance Matrix
sections.text:
Standard ID: STD-MATRIX-2026-09

Review Date: 2026-05-22

Owner: Quality Engineering Office

sections.title: 1. Scope
sections.text: This standard defines traceability requirements for document parsing agents used in corpus production.

sections.title: 2. Compliance Matrix
sections.text:
| Requirement | Mandatory Evidence | Severity | Review Note |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| REQ-1 | trace.json includes every tool call | high | must include retries |
| REQ-2 | result.json includes structured sections | high | must include tables |
| REQ-3 | retrieval manifest includes page coverage | medium | pages field required |
| REQ-4 | secret scan excludes API keys | critical | block release if failed |

sections.title: 3. Exception Rule
sections.text:
Risk: if an online parser lacks page provenance, the agent must either fallback to CLI or mark the result as review-only.

Recommendation: link this standard check to the PDF recovery evidence where executed=true is already recorded.

extracted.markdown_preview:
# Industry Standard Compliance Matrix

Standard ID: STD-MATRIX-2026-09

Review Date: 2026-05-22

Owner: Quality Engineering Office

## 1. Scope

This standard defines traceability requirements for document parsing agents used in corpus production.

## 2. Compliance Matrix

| Requirement | Mandatory Evidence | Severity | Review Note |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| REQ-1 | trace.json includes every tool call | high | must include retries |
| REQ-2 | result.json includes structured sections | high | must include tables |
| REQ-3 | retrieval manifest includes page coverage | medium | pages field required |
| REQ-4 | secret scan excludes API keys | critical | block release if failed |

## 3. Exception Rule

Risk: if an online parser lacks page provenance, the agent must either fallback to CLI or mark the result as review-only.

Recommendation: link this standard check to the PDF recovery evidence where executed=true is already recorded.

issues.message: Native document input has document-level provenance rather than page-level provenance.

actions: Native extractor result has document/slide-level provenance; use PDF/MinerU path for page-layout audit.
